results.title: Our story - Mille Notti
results.content: Our products are designed in Sweden and crafted with care by our trusted manufacturers across Europe. Learn more about our responsible production here. Our story began on a warm summer day in Portugal during the early 1990’s. Peder Wehtje, the visionary founder of Mille Notti, found himself staying at a traditional Portuguese Pousada that would forever change his perspective. This luxurious design, known as Pousada, remains one of our most cherished products to this day. Today, we are offering a curated selection of superior quality products for the bedroom and the bathroom. Bed linen, down pillows and duvets, beds, headboards, terry towels and accessories, each item thoughtfully designed and meticulously crafted to ensure unparalleled quality. Mille Notti is currently run by Peder Jr. Wehtje (Sales representative), Catherine Wehtje Hustad (Creative Director), and William Wehtje (CEO) continuing in the same spirit as their father- with the aim of consistently delivering and producing exceptional quality in a sustainable and inspiring way. ### PRODUCTION. ### PRODUCTS.
